nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaziah which he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaziah that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

cnv.text: 亞哈謝其餘所行的事蹟，不是都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 亚哈谢其他的事都记在以色列的列王史上。
